NSHAN THOMAS KESECKER AND SONA DAVTYAN

calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar Aug-28-2019 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Nshan Kesecker in Propria Persona.
Son Davtyan in Propria Persona.

Mr. Kesecker stated that no one has refused to accept the Armenian marriage certificate and that they just want to have it registered here. The Court noted that they have a record of their marriage and stated that this process is for when a license was issued here, but there is no official record of the marriage. The Petition to Establish Fact of Marriage is under submission.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.
